body:
Done. Wired Graphify enrichment into all surfacing layers:

- CLI: renderBrief() already includes Related files, Concepts, and Impact hints sections (from task-graph-core)
- MCP: get_brief tool returns enriched Brief with relatedFiles, concepts, impactHints arrays
- Dashboard: Brief.tsx updated to display the three new sections with proper styling
- Graceful degradation: all layers omit sections when graph data is absent
- Added 3 integration tests: CLI brief rendering, dashboard API enriched brief, MCP tool enriched brief

All acceptance criteria met:
- CLI output includes new sections when graph data available
- MCP get_brief returns enriched Brief interface
- Dashboard Brief page shows related files, concepts, impact hints
- All layers degrade gracefully
- 115 tests pass, typecheck clean, biome clean, validate clean
